title: DAY 08 — CRM-M7 — RETURN & REPLACEMENT — DAY 1 OF 2

questions.question: A customer contacts CRM 8 days after delivery and requests a refund for a defective watch. What is the correct policy response?

options.text: Decline — the 10-day window applies only to replacements, not returns
Proceed — the request is within the 10-day return window; initiate the return process
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager — returns within 10 days require manager approval
Direct the customer to raise a warranty claim — defects are covered under warranty, not the return policy

questions.question: A customer contacts CRM 14 days after delivery with a product defect. What is the correct action?

options.text: Process a return — the 10-day policy is flexible for genuine defects
Decline entirely — the policy window has closed and no further action is available
Direct to repair under warranty — the 10-day return/replacement window has passed; defects after 10 days are handled via the RMA Repair & Warranty SOP
Offer a replacement — replacement is available beyond 10 days for verified defects

questions.question: A customer received a Prototype watch 5 days ago and reports a manufacturing defect. What is the correct action?

options.text: Process a return with a full refund — manufacturing defects override the no-refund Prototype policy
Decline — Prototype watches cannot be returned or replaced under any circumstances
Offer a replacement only — Prototype watches are eligible for replacement for manufacturing defects within 10 days; no refund
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager — Prototype defects always require manager decision

questions.question: A customer wants to exchange their Sylvi watch for a different collection. What is the correct approved response?

options.text: Process an exchange — exchanges are available within 10 days of delivery for a different model
Exchanges are not offered — the customer must return the product and place a new order for the preferred model
Exchanges are available only if the products are within the same price range
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager — exchanges require manager sign-off and are handled case-by-case

questions.question: A customer's Certified Imperfect watch has a cracked glass (physical damage, not the disclosed imperfection). What is the correct action?

options.text: Process a return — glass damage is not one of the disclosed imperfections and qualifies for a refund
Decline — Certified Imperfect watches are non-returnable and non-refundable under all circumstances
Refer to the RMA Repair & Warranty SOP — CI mechanical defects are handled as replacements, not returns
Offer a replacement at no cost — physical damage is always covered under the CI warranty

questions.question: What is the correct opening script when a customer contacts CRM requesting a return or replacement?

options.text: "Please send us the order ID and we will check your eligibility for a return."
"Apologies for the inconvenience caused. To assist you better, please share a short 10–20 second video highlighting the issue."
"We can process your return — please confirm the delivery date so we can check if you are within the 10-day window."
"Your return request has been noted. Our team will contact you within 48 hours."

questions.question: After reviewing the customer's video and confirming the issue is valid, which script is used to confirm the customer's preference?

options.text: "Your return has been approved. We will initiate the pickup within 24–48 hours."
"Based on the video, we can offer you a replacement. Would you like to proceed?"
"Sorry for the inconvenience caused. Would you like to proceed with a return or replacement?"
"We have reviewed your issue. Please confirm your address for pickup."

questions.question: At Step 4, the CRM Executive shares the Terms & Conditions with the customer via WhatsApp. The customer replies with "OK" instead of "Yes". Is this sufficient confirmation?

options.text: No — only an explicit "Yes" reply is acceptable; "OK" must be followed up with a "Yes" confirmation
Yes — any affirmative reply from the customer on WhatsApp constitutes written confirmation
No — T&C confirmation must be done verbally over a call for it to be legally valid
Yes, but only if the Executive also screenshots the "OK" reply and uploads it to FIMS

questions.question: A customer has confirmed their preference (replacement) and the T&C has been accepted. The CRM Executive immediately opens FIMS to generate the request. What step has been skipped?

options.text: Sending the replacement notification to the customer — this must be done before FIMS
Escalating to the CRM Asst Manager for approval before generating any FIMS replacement request
Address verification (Step 5) — the pickup address must be verified for completeness, landmark, and pincode serviceability before FIMS action
Logging the request in the ReturnReplace sheet — this must be done before the FIMS request is created

questions.question: What are the three conditions that must ALL be met during address verification (Step 5) before a FIMS return/replacement request can be generated?

options.text: Customer verbally confirms address + delivery date is within 10 days + order ID is valid
Address is complete and correct + landmark is available + pincode is serviceable
Address is traceable on Google Maps + customer has confirmed in writing + phone number is correct
Address matches the FIMS order record + pincode is in the courier partner's serviceable list + landmark is stated

meta.criteria: Steps 5–6 — Address Verification & FIMS Request Generation

questions.question: In FIMS Step 6B, what is the correct path to initiate the return/replacement request?

options.text: FIMS → OMS → RMA → Create New Request → Select Order
FIMS → OMS → Shopify → Orders → Search Icon → Enter order details → View Order → Create Refund/Replacement
FIMS → Dashboard → Active Orders → Select Order → Return/Replace Tab
FIMS → Support → Customer Requests → New Request → Return or Replacement

meta.criteria: Steps 5–6 — Address Verification & FIMS Request Generation

questions.question: In FIMS Step 6C, when is a QC Image upload required?

options.text: Always — QC images are mandatory for all return and replacement requests
Only when the customer explicitly requests a QC inspection before the product is accepted
Only when "Is QC Enable Return" is checked Yes — required if the product is wrong or broken
Only for replacement requests — return requests do not require QC image upload

meta.criteria: Steps 5–6 — Address Verification & FIMS Request Generation

questions.question: After selecting Free Pickup in Step 6D, the Executive checks "Is Return Address Same?" and finds it is different. What are the required fields to fill?

options.text: Landmark and Pincode only — these are the fields most likely to have changed
Name, Address Line 1, Address Line 2, Landmark, Pincode, City, State
Mobile number and WhatsApp number only — address is updated automatically from the order record
Address Line 1 and City only — the remaining fields carry over from the original delivery address

meta.criteria: Steps 5–6 — Address Verification & FIMS Request Generation

questions.question: A customer's pincode is not serviceable. Which FIMS pickup type is selected, and what must the customer be told?

options.text: Free Pickup is still selected — the courier partner will determine serviceability at the time of pickup attempt
Self Ship is selected — the customer must ship the product to the warehouse at their own cost; the warehouse address is provided
Self Ship is selected — Sylvi covers the shipping cost in all non-serviceable cases as a goodwill gesture
The request cannot be generated in FIMS until the customer provides a serviceable pincode

meta.criteria: Steps 5–6 — Address Verification & FIMS Request Generation

questions.question: After submitting the FIMS replacement request, what must happen before the customer notification WhatsApp message is sent?

options.text: The Asst Manager must review and confirm the FIMS request
The ReturnReplace sheet must be updated first — sheet update precedes customer notification
Nothing — the FIMS submission itself triggers the notification automatically via BIK
The FIMS request must be confirmed as successfully submitted before the notification is sent; do not notify before the request is confirmed in FIMS

meta.criteria: Steps 5–6 — Address Verification & FIMS Request Generation

questions.question: A customer's watch has condensation and fogging inside the dial. Which approved issue type is this?

options.text: Particle Inside
Glass Broken
Display Damage
Fog Issue

questions.question: A customer reports the strap clasp is not locking properly. Which approved issue type applies?

options.text: Belt Broken
Lock
Strap Pin Loose
Lock Pin Issue

questions.question: In the ReturnReplace sheet, what is the difference between the "Issues" column and the "Issue Specific" column?

options.text: "Issues" records the customer's complaint in their own words; "Issue Specific" is the agent's internal assessment
"Issues" is the broad category (e.g. Quality not adequate, Size Issue); "Issue Specific" is the exact approved issue type from the 21-type list
"Issues" is filled only for return requests; "Issue Specific" is filled only for replacement requests
Both columns contain the same data — "Issue Specific" is a duplicate for QA reference

questions.question: Which of the following represents a documented common mistake in the Return & Replacement procedure?

options.text: Asking the customer to share a video before confirming the product eligibility
Verifying the pickup address before generating the FIMS request
Proceeding to FIMS without receiving the customer's written T&C confirmation
Sending the WhatsApp notification after the FIMS request has been submitted

questions.question: An order was received by a customer in a non-serviceable pincode. The customer agrees to self-ship but asks Sylvi to cover the courier cost. What is the correct action?

options.text: Approve — goodwill gestures for self-ship costs are standard practice
Decline — the policy states self-ship is at the customer's own cost; close the case
Escalate to the CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack before closing the case
Offer a partial reimbursement of ₹100 — the standard self-ship compensation amount
